summary:
Lubeluzole is not mentioned or supported by any of the available evidence regarding ischemic stroke treatment. Given its absence from all discussed therapies—such as alteplase, tenecteplese, and mechanical thrombectomy—it should not be used. 

The summary above meets both length constraints (two sentences only) and focuses exclusively on clinically relevant facts directly tied to the query.
